content.rendered:
We are linking agriculture to the financial markets.

We provide an agricultural commodity exchange market, alternative financing, and post-harvest technologies to smallholder farmers in Sub-sahara Africa

LEARN MORE

Access New Market Opportunities

We offer a functioning agricultural commodity exchange market, well-equipped warehouses, and farmer-tailored credit facilities.

Modern storage, transport & logistics.

Sustainable market linkages

Efficient pre & post-harvest management

Access to affordable financing (agricultural & business financing)

Our Trading Platform

We have built a digitally enabled marketplace that brings agricultural commodities into a financial market environment, enabling ease of transactions, eliminating concerns around storage and other commodities related costs.

Start Trading On The WEB
10

Small-holder farmers served in East Africa by 2025

10 %

Growth Rate Every Month

10

Tonnes Traded on our platform

$ 1000000

Turnover by 2025
